title: Veera Thurandhara Lyrics Kabali Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kabali Veera Thurandhara Song Lyrics
Singers: Gana Bala, Lawrence R, Pradeep Kumar
Lyrics: Uma Devi

Veera Thurandhara
emmai aalum nirandhara
Veera Thurandhara
emmai aalum nirandhara

un nilai kandu
inputraarkku
irai aagaamal
anbuttraar azha
adimaigal yezha
avar thunbuttra
thuyarangal neekkum

kabali coming
can you feel the
ground shake
 like an earthquake
nowhere to run
its too late
real gangstaz

from the city to the estate
real gangstaz
separatae good
from the great
keeping it straight OG
since the 80s
untouchable a.ka.
Kabali

fighting for whats right
standing up for the weak
looking fly
kicking ass
in a suit and hockey stick

dum dum dum ena
vedithidum pagai
kalathinil aada
verithidum kugai.
udaikallai valangidum
vali vali thunai

udaikallai valangidum
vali vali thunai
valigalil mulaithidum
vidu viduthalai
pagaivar olinjidum
veeran nee
nilam peyarindhidum
un sol peyarumaa

un nilai thanadi
malai uyarumaa
vali kaattum
thalaivanaey
ini aram urangumaa

lend me your ears
I will slice them off
with same pair of scissors
my mama use to cut cloth
every man got right
to decide his destiny
I would rather die
standing up then
living life on my knees

beat the war drums hard
dont let the music stop
magizhchi mudhal loveaz
coz this is JAM rocks!!

kabali
original gangsta!!
koor vizhi paarvai
make way for the
people's champion

kozhuthidum theeyai
kabali!!
original gangsta!!
adimaigal vazhvai
make way for the
people's champion
seer amaithidum thaanai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Veera Thurandhara'?

The song conveys themes of bravery and resilience, celebrating the spirit of overcoming challenges.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kabali'?

'Veera Thurandhara' plays during pivotal moments in Kabali, emphasizing the protagonist's strength and determination.

Who are the singers of 'Veera Thurandhara'?

The song features the talented voices of Gaana Bala, Lawrence, and Pradeep Kumar.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Umadevi, known for her impactful writing in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Veera Thurandhara' released?

The song was released on June 12, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Veera Thurandhara', the protagonists of Kabali are celebrated through a powerful anthem that embodies strength and resilience. The song serves as a rallying cry, motivating listeners to embrace their inner warrior. With its energetic beats and compelling lyrics, it evokes feelings of empowerment and determination. This track not only enhances the film's narrative but also resonates deeply with audiences, making it a memorable highlight.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Veera Thurandhara from Kabali is an electrifying anthem that captures the spirit of resilience and strength. With a powerful collaboration featuring the dynamic voices of Gaana Bala, Lawrence, and Pradeep Kumar, this song resonates with every listener. Experience the vibrant energy and motivational vibes that make this track a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Brave warrior, you always stand strong.
The earth knows the new age's battle heroes.
Your status is recognized, they come to you without hesitation, they will remove the sorrows of those who are in pain.
Brave warrior, you always stand strong.
Kabali is coming, can you feel the ground shake like an earthquake? There's nowhere to run, it's too late, real gangsters.

From the city to the estate, real gangsters separate the good from the great, keeping it straight. OG since the 80s, untouchable, Kabali fights for what's right, standing up for the weak, looking sharp, kicking ass in a suit and hockey stick. Dum dum dum, whatever I do, I will dance in the battlefield.
Whatever I do, I will dance in the battlefield. In the fields, freedom will bloom, the brave will rise, and your name will be known by your words.
Is your status high like the evening sky? Will the leader show the way?
Brave warrior, you always stand strong.
Lend me your ears, I will cut them off with the same scissors my mom uses to cut cloth. Every man has the right to decide his destiny. I would rather die standing than live life on my knees.
Beat the war drums hard, don't let the music stop. Happiness starts with love because this is JAM rocks!!
I met the rights and felt the world, who showed me in this world?
Brave warrior, you always stand strong.
Obstacles are to be overcome, leaders must rise, the one who fights will win.
Brave warrior, you always stand strong.
Kabali, the original gangster! Look at the fierce eyes, make way for the people's champion.
Burning fire, Kabali! Original gangster! The slaves will live, make way for the people's champion, the one who brings peace.
